problem id: 70f81613
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5)

examples:
  00010010 -> 01000010
  00010100 -> 10000010
  00010001 -> 00100010
  10000101 -> 10110000
  10110110 -> 11010110
  01101100 -> 10001101
  00001001 -> 00100001
  10001011 -> 01110001

query: 11010101
predicted answer: 10111010
